title: Refunds and Withdrawals

text:
Refunds and Withdrawals
Please visit www.nyu.edu/bursar and select Refunds. Once the initial refund process is run for the term, refunds are processed every business day. US students will receive the refund by setting up an eRefund account for direct deposit to a US checking account in eSuite.
If you drop a class or withdraw from a semester at Shanghai New York University, you may be eligible to receive a refund depending on how much of the semester has passed.
Academic Year 2025-2026
What if I’m going to withdraw from school, what is the refund schedule for that?
The Refund Schedule below is for students completely withdrawing from all courses during the semester.
What if I’m going to drop the classes, what is the refund schedule for that?
The Refund Schedule below is for students who are dropping classes, but will remain enrolled in at least one course.
Academic Year 2024-2025
What if I’m going to withdraw from school, what is the refund schedule for that?
The Refund Schedule below is for students completely withdrawing from all courses during the semester.
What if I’m going to drop the classes, what is the refund schedule for that?
The Refund Schedule below is for students who are dropping classes, but will remain enrolled in at least one course.
ct to the university Refund Schedule policy. If you are a financial aid recipient, your refund will not be processed until a calculation is performed to determine the amount of financial aid, if any, you are still eligible to receive.
Academic Year 2023-2024
What if I’m going to withdraw from school, what is the refund schedule for that?
The Refund Schedule below is for students who are completely withdrawing from all courses during the semester.
What if I’m going to drop the classes, what is the refund schedule for that?
The Refund Schedule below is for students who are dropping classes, but will remain enrolled in at least one course.
What if I’m going to withdraw from school, what is the refund schedule for that?
The Refund Schedule below is for students who are completely withdrawing from all courses during the semester.
What if I’m going to drop the classes, what is the refund schedule for that?
The Refund Schedule below is for students who are dropping classes, but will remain enrolled in at least one course.
Note: Refund/Withdrawal schedule is only applicable for students who study in Shanghai. Students in other global sites please refer to local refund and withdrawal schedule.

text_blocks.text: Refunds and Withdrawals

Please visit www.nyu.edu/bursar and select Refunds. Once the initial refund process is run for the term, refunds are processed every business day. US students will receive the refund by setting up an eRefund account for direct deposit to a US checking account in eSuite.
If you drop a class or withdraw from a semester at Shanghai New York University, you may be eligible to receive a refund depending on how much of the semester has passed.
Academic Year 2025-2026
What if I’m going to withdraw from school, what is the refund schedule for that?
The Refund Schedule below is for students completely withdrawing from all courses during the semester.
What if I’m going to drop the classes, what is the refund schedule for that?
The Refund Schedule below is for students who are dropping classes, but will remain enrolled in at least one course.

The Refund Schedule below is for students completely withdrawing from all courses during the semester.

The Refund Schedule below is for students who are dropping classes, but will remain enrolled in at least one course.

ct to the university Refund Schedule policy. If you are a financial aid recipient, your refund will not be processed until a calculation is performed to determine the amount of financial aid, if any, you are still eligible to receive.
